title: cylicodaphne noronhae
intro: Cylicodaphne noronhae, also known as the Sandalwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Lauraceae family native to the Western Ghats of India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cylicodaphne noronhae include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Cylicodaphne noronhae is commonly used in herbal preparations, including essential oils and extracts, which are used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
